name: getHistory
description: ALWAYS USE THIS TOOL to retrieve historical chat records and past events when a timeframe is known. Fetches directly from the database — never infer historical data from conversation context. If a previous call returned no data, try different start/end parameters or a broader range. For large result sets, AI summarization is applied automatically. To identify relevant time periods first, call getTimeline, then pass its timestamps to this tool.

start.description: REQUIRED: start timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD, DD.MM.YYYY, or ISO 8601). If date-only, time defaults to 00:00:00.

end.description: OPTIONAL: end timestamp. If omitted, defaults to 23:59:59 of the start date. If date-only, end is exclusive at next day 00:00:00.

start_ctx_id.description: OPTIONAL: continue pagination from after this ctx_id (applies across all channels).

prompt.description: OPTIONAL: additional instructions to steer the AI summary (e.g. 'focus on combat events').
